title: Mainstay SMP Modpack
description: Modpack for those who want to use all server features
body:
# Mainstay SMP Modpack  
### Minimal & Full Edition - Client Utility Packs

The **Mainstay SMP Modpack** is a client-side modpack family designed to **unlock the full potential of server-side features**, while improving performance, visuals, and quality of life — **without breaking the vanilla feel**.

These modpacks are intended as the **recommended client setup for Mainstay SMP**, but they can also be used as a **clean base for your own custom modpack**.

---

## 🧩 Core Philosophy

- Client-side only  
- Vanilla-friendly gameplay  
- Full compatibility with server-side mods  
- Performance first, visuals second, utility third  
- No unnecessary or intrusive mechanics  

The goal is simple:  
**see more, know more, play smoother — without changing how Minecraft works.**

---

## ⚡ Performance & Stability

Both editions focus on stable, efficient gameplay:
- Sodium ecosystem (Sodium, Sodium Extra, Reeses Options)
- Lithium, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast
- Entity Culling, More Culling
- Dynamic FPS for background optimization

These mods ensure high FPS, reduced stutter, and low memory usage even on large servers.

---

## 🎨 Visual Improvements (Vanilla Style)

Visual upgrades are carefully selected to enhance immersion **without altering Minecraft’s original look**:
- Better Clouds, Continuity
- Entity Texture & Model Features
- Skin Layers 3D, Capes, Wavey Capes
- Iris (shader support, optional)
- Ambient-friendly particle and lighting tweaks

---

## 🗺️ Exploration & Navigation

Designed to fully support server-side features:
- Xaero’s Minimap & World Map (+ XaeroPlus)
- Waypoints and zoom tools
- Voxy for extended world rendering (server-friendly)

---

## 🔊 Audio & Social Interaction

Immersion and communication are key on SMP servers:
- Simple Voice Chat + Voice Messages
- Presence Footsteps (Full Edition)
- Drip Sounds (Full Edition)
- Clear positional and environmental audio

---

## 🧱 Utility & Quality of Life

Small changes that make a big difference:
- AppleSkin, Jade / WTHIT
- Quick Shulker, Peek, Shulker tooltips
- Better Stats, Status indicators
- Inventory, hotbar, and UI enhancements
- Litematica & Syncmatica (for supported servers)

Many mods **unlock extra functionality when the server provides matching server-side mods**.

---

## 🔀 Modular by Design

- Some mods are **disabled by default**
- Alternatives are included where relevant
- Users can switch mods depending on:
  - Server rules
  - Performance needs
  - Personal preferences

This makes the modpack flexible and future-proof.

---

## 📦 Editions Explained

### 🔹 Minimal Edition
- Lightweight and clean
- Performance, visuals, and essential QoL only
- Ideal for:
  - Low-end PCs
  - Players who want a near-vanilla experience
  - A base for custom modpacks

### 🔸 Full Edition
- Everything from Minimal, plus:
  - Advanced building & technical tools
  - Extended audio immersion
  - More visual feedback
- Ideal for:
  - Power users
  - Builders and technical players
  - Players who want maximum client-side control

---

## ✅ Server Compatibility

- **Recommended for Mainstay SMP**
- Client-side only
- Safe to join vanilla or modded servers
- Many features scale automatically based on server support

---

## 🎯 Recommended Use

> **Mainstay SMP Modpack (Minimal or Full Edition)**  
> is the recommended choice if you want a stable, performant, and future-proof client —  
> or a solid foundation to build your own modpack.

---

Balanced. Clean. Expandable.  
**Mainstay SMP Modpack** keeps Minecraft vanilla — just better.
